query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime urban street lined with dense leafy trees. A tall cream-colored historic building with illuminated windows and bright tower lights rises above the tree canopy in the background, adjacent to a darker modern building. A tall streetlamp on the left shines through the branches, creating a pronounced starburst effect. A red car is parked along the right curb. The dark sky contrasts with the warm artificial lighting throughout the scene.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime urban street lined with dense leafy trees, with long red and orange light trails from passing vehicles streaking across the lower portion of the frame through intentional motion blur. A tall cream-colored historic building with illuminated windows and bright tower lights rises above the tree canopy in the background, next to a darker modern building. A tall streetlamp on the left shines through the branches with a starburst effect. A red car is parked along the right curb. The light trails create dynamic ribbons of color against the dark, stationary environment.
